attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who bridges solo in final 15-20km or capitalizes on early race chaos (crosswinds, echelons). Capable of sustained tempo-driving in breaks but lacks tactical sprint positioning experience in small group finishes.
team_tactics: Often operates without dedicated team support in breakaways, suggesting role as autonomous stage hunter. Teams commit him to speculative moves rather than controlled leadouts.
terrain_preference: Excels on cobbled classics (reached Roubaix velodrome 2019) and punchy selection stages. Strong time trialist emerging 2019+. Crosswind chaos scenarios suit his power profile and opportunism.
vulnerability: Mechanical failures when exceeding power thresholds (chain snap 2023 TDF). Poor tactical positioning in small group sprints despite matching pace of elite riders. Lacks protected status requiring self-reliance.
key_patterns: Solo bridging specialist: executed 15km+ chase efforts without support in multiple races (2018 Paris-Nice, 2021 TDF)
Breakaway tempo engine: regularly drives pace in breaks until mechanical or finish, not conservation-minded
Crosswind opportunist: won 2021 TDF stage from echelon chaos, thrives in chaotic opening scenarios
Tactical sprint weakness: matched Gilbert to velodrome but forced high line, lacks positioning instincts
Equipment vulnerability: chain snapped under sustained power effort plus wrong spare bike (2023 TDF)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 TDF mechanical disaster suggests physical decline or equipment stress under peak efforts compared to 2021 stage win and 2019 Roubaix breakthrough
